message:
🐛 Fix inaccurate cluster inventory across 12 hooks and components (#11045)

Use deduplicatedClusters instead of raw clusters for counting, scanning,
and display. Multiple kubeconfig contexts can point to the same physical
cluster — without dedup, metrics hooks (Trivy, Kyverno, Kubescape, RBAC,
in-toto, CertManager, DataCompliance) over-counted clusters in their
totalClusters stats, and sent redundant health probes to the same server.

Files fixed:
- useDataCompliance, useTrivy, useRBACFindings, useKyverno, useKubescape,
  useIntoto, useCertManager, useProviderHealth (hooks)
- GitOps, ControlPlaneHealth, DataComplianceCards, ComplianceReports
  (components)

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
